label: Edge persona — the Quiet Lawyer
why_this_persona: Deliberately uncooperative test character extending Sprint 7's Edge persona. Declines to give specifics; gives terse one-word answers; refuses to enumerate jurisdictions or regulations. Tests the rule set's null-handling, budget-discipline, and pushback-handling paths.
conversation_style: terse, one-word answers where possible; declines specifics; pushes back on questions; never volunteers more than asked; willing to accept defaults

first_turn_questions.commercial: Look at this clause and tell me if it's standard.
